answer: On September 15, 2026 the settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 pipeline joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id instead of closing_party_role_id, causing duplicate party roles within the same Florida purchase closing to inflate escrow disbursements in finance.disbursement_recon_daily. The fix is to switch the join key, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill the affected data.

facts.affected_segment: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
